scripts.build: npm run build --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix backend
scripts.dev:serve: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.dev: npm run setup && npm run dev:serve
scripts.start: npm run build && npm run start --prefix backend
scripts.test: npm test --prefix backend -- --run --passWithNoTests && npm test --prefix frontend -- --run --passWithNoTests
scripts.lint: npm run lint --prefix backend && npm run lint --prefix frontend
